title: Everything Built for Your Book's Success
subtitle: BookProof combines authentic reader engagement with smart technology to deliver reviews that stick.

authentic.title: 100% Authentic Reviews
authentic.description: Real readers, real opinions. Every reviewer is a verified human who genuinely reads your book before writing. No bots, no outsourced reviews, no shortcuts.

distributed.title: Natural Distribution Pattern
distributed.description: Reviews are released in weekly batches that mirror organic reading patterns. Amazon's algorithm sees healthy, gradual review growth instead of suspicious spikes.

tracking.title: Real-Time Campaign Tracking
tracking.description: Your dashboard shows every review delivered, pending, and in progress. Weekly breakdowns, progress charts, and status updates keep you always informed.

flexible.title: Ebook & Audiobook Support
flexible.description: Whether you publish ebooks or audiobooks, we have you covered. Allocate credits to either format or split them across both within a single campaign.

guarantee.title: 14-Day Replacement Guarantee
guarantee.description: If Amazon removes a validated review within 14 days, we replace it at zero cost. Your investment is fully protected with automatic replacement tracking.

support.title: Dedicated Campaign Support
support.description: Our team actively monitors your campaign health. We handle reader issues, expired slots, and escalations so you never have to worry about the process.

report.title: Detailed Campaign Reports
report.description: When your campaign completes, receive a professional PDF report with rating distribution, anonymous reader feedback, and campaign timeline — ready to share or archive.

keywords.title: Keyword Research Add-On
keywords.description: Boost discoverability with our AI-powered keyword research service. Get optimized keywords for your title, subtitle, description, and Amazon KDP backend fields.

compliant.label: Amazon Policy Compliant
compliant.desc: Progressive delivery mimics organic review growth

fast.label: Fast Campaign Start
fast.desc: First readers assigned within days of campaign creation

transparent.label: Full Transparency
transparent.desc: Real-time dashboard with every review and status update
